name: dnd-scribe
description: DnD Scribe production and local operator app.

scripts.check: npm run check:web && npm run check:api && npm run check:workers && npm run check:roll20 && npm run check:monitoring
scripts.check:web: node --check web/app.js && node --check web/jobs.js && node --check web/storage-inventory.js && node --check web/costs.js && node --check web/ui-bridge.js && node --check web/auth-fetch.js && node --check web/access.js && node --check web/notes.js && node --check web/roll20.js && node --check web/roll20-bridge.js && node --check web/roll20-bridge-page.js
scripts.check:api: node --check lib/discord.js && node --check lib/discord-interactions.js && node --check lib/pipeline-recovery.js && node --check lib/roll20-commands.js && node --check lib/monitoring.js && node --check lib/job-steps.js && node --check api/[...path].js && node --check api/ai-cost.js && node --check scripts/register-discord-commands.js && node --check scripts/smoke-production-routes.js && node --check tools/audit_production_session.js
scripts.check:monitoring: node --check lib/monitoring.js && node --check web/monitoring.js && node --check web/storage-inventory.js
scripts.check:roll20: node --check lib/roll20-commands.js && node --check tools/roll20_chat_to_events.js && node --check web/roll20.js && node --check integrations/roll20/dnd-scribe-mod.js && node --check integrations/roll20/chrome-extension/background.js && node --check integrations/roll20/chrome-extension/content.js
